summary: User: पंप पंप पं | IP Prime: Arey bhai, lagta hai tumhara 'neural link' phir se disconnect ho raha hai! Main kuch samajh nahi pa raha bhai. Let's rule the day, bro! | IP Prime: Yo Pratik! Core system fully operational hai, dost. Space nebulae and stardust are synchronized. Batao bhai, aaj code me kya aag lagani hai?
